aboutData.title: Hi There! I'm Elijah Ajibade
aboutData.subtitle: Full Stack Software Developer With A Cutting Edge Product Sense
aboutData.text: Results-driven software engineer with a strong foundation in Mathematical Science (Computer Science), expertise in modern programming technologies, and a track record of delivering scalable, high-quality solutions. Highly skilled in team collaboration and committed to continuous learning, I strive to solve real-world challenges and contribute to organizational success. Seeking a challenging and rewarding opportunity where I can contribute my skills and experience to solve real world problems!

services.title: Problem Solving
services.text: I pride myself in my ability to break down problems to it's smallest possible bits, seeing connections and patterns via critical thinking and proferring adequate solutions

services.title: Frontend Development
services.text: Creating responsive and interactive web interfaces using React, Angular, and modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind and Bootstrap for optimal user experiences.

services.title: Backend Development
services.text: Building scalable server-side applications using Node.js, Express, and PHP, with expertise in both SQL and NoSQL database management.

services.title: Database Design
services.text: Proficient in designing and implementing database solutions using MySQL and MongoDB, ensuring optimal data structure and performance.

services.title: API Development
services.text: Creating robust RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, with TypeScript integration for enhanced code reliability and maintainability.

services.title: Expert Trainer
services.text: Experienced in facilitating digital skills training programs and technical workshops, with a proven track record of successful knowledge transfer.

skillData.title: Technical Expertise and Professional Skills
skillData.text: I bring expertise in modern web technologies and a commitment to delivering high-quality solutions. My experience spans full-stack development, with particular strength in the MERN stack and TypeScript, complemented by strong problem-solving and collaboration skills.

portfolioItems.title: Porfolio Website
portfolioItems.subTitle: I developed this sleek portfolio website you're currently browsing!

portfolioItems.title: LevCom Online Store
portfolioItems.subTitle: I developed an enterprise level ecommerce app that leverages on the shared economy to provide goods and services at an affordable rate to Nigerians

portfolioItems.title: V-Concepts LTD Coporate Website
portfolioItems.subTitle: I designed  a responsive and intutive website  (with an online bookshop inegrated) for a publishing firm using WordPress.

informations.text: 'Thank you very much for the good work, you too much!' were some of my words to Elijah during our web development process. Elijah knows his onions, I highly recommend!

experience.title: Software Engineering Fellow
experience.subTitle: Brave Redemptive Fellowship
experience.text: Deepened my knowledge of the MERN STACK, learnt  how to built enterprise-level software solutions,  I also learnt and practiced more advanced level software development concepts and best practices. I also learnt product sense making, systems thinking, collaboration, among others

experience.title: Web Developer (LAMP Stack)
experience.subTitle: Better Place LTD
experience.text: Designed and developed websites and landing pages that brought in up to 800% return on investment. Setup information systems and basic networking infrastructure that increased operational efficiency.

education.title: Bachelor of Technology, Mathematical Sciences (Computer Science)
education.subTitle: Olusegun Agagu University of Science and Technology (OAUSTECH)
education.text: Graduated among the top in my class, while contributing to community development via the Techtiary Club and the National Association of Computer Science Students (NACOS) among others. I also took courses on C++ and Java.

education.title: SHE Hacks Africa Coding Bootcamp
education.subTitle: Working to Advance Science and Technology Education for African Women (WAAW Foundation)
education.text: Took a deep dive into Version control, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Apache/MySQL, PHP, Node.js and ionic framework. My team and I built an Electronic Medical Records (EMR) website as our capstone project, emerging as first runners up in the demo
